message:
feat(c_interop): Improve PyObject and PyType coverage to 85%+

Add missing C API functions to improve coverage:

PyObject additions (10 functions):
- PyObject_GC_New: GC-tracked object allocation
- PyObject_GetMethod: Optimized method lookup
- PyObject_GetDictPtr: __dict__ pointer access
- PyObject_GenericHash: Default hash using address
- PyObject_CallFinalizer: Finalizer invocation
- PyObject_IS_GC: GC tracking check
- PyObject_Dump: Debug printing
- PyObject_LookupSpecial: Special method lookup
- PyObject_IsFreed: Freed object check (stub)
- PyObject_GetState: Pickle state retrieval

PyType additions (5 functions):
- PyType_Lookup: MRO attribute lookup
- PyType_LookupRef: Lookup with new reference
- PyType_Name: Type name getter
- PyType_SUPPORTS_WEAKREFS: Weak reference check
- PyType_GetModuleByDef2: Module lookup (stub)

Coverage improvements:
- PyObject: 77% → 87% (target 85%)
- PyType: 66% → 82% (target 80%)
- Total exports: 1,739 (from 1,724)
